item.title: Force and Torque Sensor Integration Has Come a Long Way
item.description: Advancements in force and torque sensor integration now allow direct digital connections for improved inline measurements and quality control on production lines.

item.title: Octave Launches New Brand Built Around Unleashing Intelligence at Scale
item.description: Hexagon AB's potential software spin-off, Octave, aims to deliver asset lifecycle intelligence and manage change across critical infrastructure.

item.title: Report Highlights How AI and Digital Platforms Are Powering Manufacturing’s Future
item.description: A new report by Fictiv and MISUMI Global reveals that senior supply chain and manufacturing leaders are increasingly relying on AI and digital platforms to optimize operations.

item.title: Engineering Tomorrow: Waygate Technologies Drives the Future of NDT with Integrated AI and Automation
item.description: Waygate Technologies integrates AI and automation into its non-destructive testing systems, providing advanced turnkey solutions for industrial quality control.

item.title: LUCID Atlas10 SWIR 10GigE RDMA Cameras
item.description: LUCID introduces its new Atlas10 SWIR 10GigE RDMA cameras, expanding high-speed machine vision hardware options for industrial inspection applications.

item.title: CMM Adaptation to Future Manufacturing Demands
item.description: Coordinate Measuring Machines are evolving into automated, shop-floor ready smart factory solutions for inline precision inspection.

item.title: Multisensor Metrology Automating Micron-Level Inspection in Micro Waterjet Cutting
item.description: WatAJet integrates Mitutoyo's Quick Vision Apex to revolutionize automated quality control in micro waterjet cutting.
